title: Proclamation No. 483, s. 1968
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 483

RESERVING FOR CHILDREN’S PARK AND PLAYGROUND PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAGUM, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL NORTE.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for children’s park and playground purposes under the administration of the municipal government of Tagum, subject to private rights if any there be, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in the municipality of Tagum, province of Davao del Norte, which is more particularly described as follows:

Lot 1333 Tagum Cadastre

A PARCEL OF LAND (Lot 18 of plan Gss-229 Sheet 1), situated in the City of Davao. Bounded on the S., along line 1-2, by Lot 20; on the SW., along line 2-3, by Lot 25, both of plan Gss-229; on the W. and N., along lines 3-4-5-6, by Lot 39 (Road); and on the E., along line 6-1, by Lot 17, both of plan Gss-299. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 0 deg. 43’ E., 1819.45 m. from B.L.L.M. 5, Davao Cad.,

thence N. 55 deg. 45’ W., 52.55 m. to point 2; thence N. 5 deg. 46’ E., 40.07 m. to point 3; thence N. 82 deg. 58’ E., 72.58 m. to point 4; thence N. 50 deg. 39’ E., 36.73 m. to point 5; thence S. 7 deg. 39’ E., 19.90 m. to point 6; thence N. 71 deg. 07’ E., 30.76 m. to point 7; thence N. 74 deg. 41’ E., 21.19 m. to point 8; thence N. 37 deg. 04’ E., 49.30 m. to point 9; thence N. 65 deg. 46’ E., 48.21 m. to point 10; thence S. 26 deg. 51’ E., 58.66 m. to point 11; thence S. 68 deg. 46’ W., 97.34 m. to point 12; thence S. 65 deg. 01’ W., 134.66 m. to point of; beginning; containing an approximate area of THIRTEEN THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED FORTY EIGHT (13, 848) Square Meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by Old Points; bearings true; date of the cadastral survey, April 1935-May 1938.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28th day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-eight.

(SGD.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippine

By the President: (SGD.) JOSE J. LEIDO JR. Assistant Executive Secretary

Source: Presidential Management Staff
